---
title: "cl_01_dc_filtering"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# This is the setup chunk
#  Here you can set global options for the entire document

library(knitr) # I recommend doing this here
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(here)
library(exactextractr)
library(terra)
library(purrr)
library(tigris)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(fixest)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

# Although you can call functions from a library using the following notation
#  without loading the entire library.
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, 
                      tidy = TRUE,
                      tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 60),
                      comment = NA, # Required
                      fig.path = "./figures/",  # Store all figures here in relative path (make the folder first)
                      fig.align = "center",
                      fig.width = 7,
                      fig.height = 7,
                      message = FALSE, # Turn off load messages
                      warning = FALSE # Turn off warnings
                      )

```

```{r}
data_centers <- read_csv(here('data', 'data_final', 'clean01_datacenter.csv'))
```

```{r}
filter_dc_base <- function(df, year_min, year_max, hyperscale_only = FALSE) {
  base <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(year_operational), stage == "Operational",
           year_operational >= year_min, year_operational <= year_max)
  if (hyperscale_only) {
    base <- base %>% filter(capacity_type == "Hyperscaler")
  }
  base
}

filter_isolated <- function(df, threshold_m) {
  df %>% filter(dist_to_nearest_dc_m >= threshold_m)
}

build_isolation_sets <- function(df, sensor_years, thresholds) {
  # Non-hyperscale: vary by isolation threshold, as before
  combos <- expand_grid(
    sensor      = names(sensor_years),
    threshold_m = thresholds
  )

  iso_sets <- combos %>%
    pmap(function(sensor, threshold_m) {
      yrs  <- sensor_years[[sensor]]
      base <- filter_dc_base(df, yrs[1], yrs[2], hyperscale_only = FALSE)
      filter_isolated(base, threshold_m)
    })

  names(iso_sets) <- combos %>%
    mutate(name = paste0(sensor, "_iso", threshold_m, "m")) %>%
    pull(name)

  # Hyperscale: no isolation-distance filter applied (every
  # threshold from 2500m-10000m returned 0 rows - hyperscale
  # facilities cluster near other DCs, one set per sensor 
  hyperscale_sets <- map(names(sensor_years), function(sensor) {
    yrs <- sensor_years[[sensor]]
    filter_dc_base(df, yrs[1], yrs[2], hyperscale_only = TRUE)
  })
  names(hyperscale_sets) <- paste0(names(sensor_years), "_hyperscale_all")
  
  # All Facilities: no isolation-distance filter applied for Landsat years
  landsat_all_set <- list()
  if ("landsat" %in% names(sensor_years)) {
    landsat_yrs <- sensor_years[["landsat"]]
    landsat_all_set[["landsat_all"]] <- filter_dc_base(df, landsat_yrs[1], landsat_yrs[2], hyperscale_only = FALSE)
  }

  return(c(iso_sets, hyperscale_sets, landsat_all_set))
}

```

```{r}
sensor_years <- list(modis = c(2001, 2024), landsat = c(2014, 2024))
thresholds   <- c(10000, 7500, 5000, 2500)

isolation_sets <- build_isolation_sets(data_centers, sensor_years, thresholds)
```

```{r}
export_isolated_shp <- function(df, name, out_dir = here("data", "data_raw", "shp")) {
  if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  export_sf <- df %>%
    st_as_sf(coords = c("projected_x", "projected_y"), crs = 5070) %>%
    select(export_id) %>%
    st_transform(4326)  # GEE expects WGS84 lon/lat for FeatureCollection ingestion

  out_path <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(name, ".shp"))
  st_write(export_sf, out_path, delete_layer = TRUE)
  out_path
}
```

```{r}
walk2(isolation_sets, names(isolation_sets), export_isolated_shp)
```

```{r}
# Save each isolation set as a CSV so analysis scripts can read them
# directly without re-running filtering logic
out_dir <- here("data", "data_final", "isolation_sets")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

walk2(isolation_sets, names(isolation_sets), function(df, name) {
  write_csv(df, file.path(out_dir, paste0(name, ".csv")))
})
```


```{r all146-set}
dc_146 <- data_centers %>%
  filter(stage == "Operational",
         !is.na(year_operational),
         year_operational >= 2014, year_operational <= 2024)

cat("All-146 set:", nrow(dc_146), "DCs\n")

export_isolated_shp(dc_146, "landsat_all146")

out_dir <- here("data", "data_final", "isolation_sets")
write_csv(dc_146, file.path(out_dir, "landsat_all.csv"))
```

```{r pre2014-set}
out_dir <- here("data", "data_final", "isolation_sets")
dc_pre2014 <- data_centers %>%
  filter(stage == "Operational",
         !is.na(year_operational),
         capacity_type == "Hyperscaler",          
         year_operational >= 2000,
         year_operational <= 2013)
cat("Pre-2014 hyperscale set:", nrow(dc_pre2014), "DCs",
    "| in 2012-13 seam cohort:", sum(dc_pre2014$year_operational >= 2012), "\n")
export_isolated_shp(dc_pre2014, "landsat_pre2014")
write_csv(dc_pre2014, file.path(out_dir, "landsat_pre2014.csv"))
```
```{r}
dc_pre2014_priority <- dc_pre2014 %>%
  mutate(
    is_hyperscale = capacity_type == "Hyperscaler",
    # isolation still matters for the CONTROL ring even under intensity —
    # a colo in a Manhattan block has no clean 1-7.5km annulus either
    reasonably_sited = dist_to_nearest_dc_m >= 1000    # loose, not the old 2500
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(is_hyperscale), desc(dist_to_nearest_dc_m))

# Tier 1: all pre-2014 hyperscale (your advisor's focus + sample-size goal)
tier1 <- dc_pre2014_priority %>% filter(is_hyperscale)
# Tier 2: non-hyperscale with >= 1km separation, capped
tier2 <- dc_pre2014_priority %>% filter(!is_hyperscale) %>%
  slice_head(n = max(0, 60 - nrow(tier1)))

dc_pre2014_final <- bind_rows(tier1, tier2)
cat("Tier 1 (hyperscale):", nrow(tier1),
    "| Tier 2:", nrow(tier2),
    "| Total:", nrow(dc_pre2014_final), "\n")
```


```{r hyperscale-noyear-set}
dc_hs_extra <- data_centers %>%
  filter(capacity_type == "Hyperscaler", stage == "Operational") %>%
  # everything hyperscale-operational, year known or not
  distinct(export_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

cat("Hyperscale (all, incl. missing year):", nrow(dc_hs_extra),
    "| missing year_operational:", sum(is.na(dc_hs_extra$year_operational)), "\n")
export_isolated_shp(dc_hs_extra, "landsat_hs_extra")
write_csv(dc_hs_extra, file.path(out_dir, "landsat_hs_extra.csv"))
```
